jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at 5paisa - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, 5paisa in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa:
5paisa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa!
